findings_history.notes: 64 tests. Fixed nodeContextMenu backdrop. mindmapApi service tests. Zero assertion failures.
Fixed useGraphInit.helpers.test.ts Vite transform error. Added mindmapAiApi.ts contract tests (11 tests). 69 files / 2270 tests.
140 new tests. Hardened performance flake. 72 files / 2410 tests.
92 new tests + devWarn helper, 33 callsites refactored. 74 files / 2507 tests.
AiTutorPanel coverage 20→48. Fixed 2 silent-crash i18n bugs. 74 files / 2537 tests.
GraphTemplatePanel coverage 21→47. Fixed 3rd silent-crash i18n bug. 74 files / 2563 tests.
GraphSidebar coverage 27→58. Defect-class regression EXPANDED — caught 4 more silent-crash sites. 74 files / 2588 tests.
useDragConnect coverage 35→67. Pointer-state-machine pinned. 74 files / 2620 tests.
NodeAnnotationModal coverage 16→47. Save/delete/scroll-lock pinned. 74 files / 2651 tests.
useGraphInit coverage 32→88. 7 layout configs pinned tunable-by-tunable. 74 files / 2707 tests.

useEdgeReconnect coverage 30→65 (sister hook to useDragConnect — now lowest test:src ratio at 0.44): added 35 tests covering pointer-state-machine source guarantees (capture:true on pointerdown + keydown — 2 unbinds matched to 5 binds — TOUCH_DRAG_THRESHOLD touch handling), hover throttling (HOVER_CHECK_THROTTLE_MS=50, user-edge cache via userEdgesRef, ENDPOINT_HIT_RADIUS=14 grab cursor), reconnect callback shape (oldEdge + movedEndpoint + newNodeId, no-op when snap is original source/target), excluded-fixed-endpoint invariant (source dragged → target excluded), edge visual feedback (opacity 0.15 dim + lineDash [4,4] during drag, 3+ restore-to-1 callsites for symmetry across pointerup/pointercancel/cleanup), mid-drag-unmount cleanup (pointer-capture release if captured, opacity restore if activated, cursor reset, rAF cancel), Escape via synthetic PointerEvent('pointercancel') with preventDefault+stopPropagation, isDragging() returned API, optional batchDraw passthrough fallback to graph.draw(), user-edge filter dep on [edges]. Threshold constants documented relative to sister hook (NODE_SNAP_RADIUS=24 < useDragConnect's 55 because endpoint dragging is more precise; DRAG_THRESHOLD=6 > useDragConnect's 4 because endpoint hits are more accidental). Result: 74 files / 2742 tests, ALL PASSING. Phase 2/3/4 audits unchanged.

cumulative.milestone: PERFECT — 74/74 files pass, 2742/2742 assertions pass; both sister drag hooks (useDragConnect + useEdgeReconnect) fully pinned at the same level of behavioral detail
